name: v08_ed25519_tampered
description: A passport identical to v07 except the payload.output was modified after signing. Signature verification MUST fail.

expected.note: Tampering with the payload changes the canonical bytes over which the signature was computed. A conformant verifier MUST detect this and return false. Note: the stored integrity_hash and payload_hash in this vector are left unchanged on purpose — only the visible payload changed. A full Core+Signed verifier would detect the tamper at both the integrity layer AND the signature layer; this vector specifically tests the signature layer.
